feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: We're The Wild Ones, Raised By Wolves.
entry.summary:
Author: halelujah

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 75,133Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 1,827

Summary: "Your uncle not only killed people, he bit Scott unlawfully and without his consent, he also put a big, red target on our backs." Stiles continues calmly, folding her arms across her chest. She can't help but glare. "An action that I'm now going to reap the repercussions for.""He wasn't yours to kill!" Derek rumbles, icy blue flashing in his eyes. "He murdered Laura!"She sees the decision in Derek's eyes before it even turns in his mind that he should attack. As she watches Derek's muscles twitch and tense, she lets out a sharp bark, one that tells Scott to stay out of it, before she meets Derek head on, eyes burning crimson. [Or the fic where Stiles has always been a werewolf, an Alpha and female.]

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Art; Search For The Hale Relic
entry.summary:
Author: Goddess47

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 0Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 9

Summary: Derek Hale has hired Spark Stiles to help him retrieve the Hale Relic being held on Argent Land. There is a rumor that the Relic is to be destroyed by the Argents soon, so they need to find the Relic, steal it from the Argents, and return to Hale land with a deadline over their heads.

entry.title: Surrounded by darkness
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,978Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 15

Summary: I would like to point out that English is not my native language.After the fight with Donovan, Stiles falls with him and loses his sight. Scott and the pack turn their backs on him, believing Theo's lies. Theo actually wants nothing more than to push them away so he can have the boy all to himself. Stiles is depressed and doesn't know what to do with his life. All his dreams have vanished, and now he must accept his new condition. Will anyone help him?

entry.title: The Secret
entry.summary:
Author: Nyx_A

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,937Chapters: 5/8Kudos: 35

Summary: Seems like everyone BUT Stiles is in on a secret involving Stiles and Derek yet no one is willing to help the poor human and let him know. Meanwhile Derek is trying desperately to not show any emotions that might hint at the truth. All of this is going on when the pack is under attack by a strange wolf pack threatening to take over the Hale land.

entry.title: It Was A Stranger Beneath My Face
entry.summary:
Author: The_Lady_Grey

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,705Chapters: 8/9Kudos: 106

Summary: Unknown caller.Okay. Great.Not like it could be the scum of the earth that he’d been hunting across goddamn Narnia or anything. He knew, Stiles knew that he shouldn’t answer it, but at this point he was a glutton for punishment.“Stilinski speaking,” he said, work voice in place despite the way his chest still heaved and his legs burned post-run. The line was silent for a moment.“Stiles?” The voice was familiar and it seemed shocked that he had picked up his own phone. or An AU where the Nogistune ordeal happens... differently but Stiles is still cast out. Alas, a string of murders have the pack crawling back for help. Shenanigans ensue.

entry.title: Only When It's You
entry.summary:
Author: MystikCeleste

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,182Chapters: 7/39Kudos: 45

Summary: A plan that will bring together the Supernatural world of the West Coast and the Shadow World of the East Coast. Two brothers that don't know the other exists. Two groups of warriors fighting the same war on opposite sides of the country. Warriors that should know each other, but don’t. It’s time for them to meet.

entry.title: The Ties That Bind
entry.summary:
Author: Rnl1993

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 97,017Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 79

Summary: Dean and Sam grew up stopping by the Stilinski's house throughout the years. When Stiles ends up in the hospital due to a supernatural accident, Papa Stilinski decides to send Stiles with Dean for the summer to get properly trained. After all, he knows Stiles won't stop helping his friends and the best way to prepare him is to be trained by someone whose life is dedicated to dealing with the supernatural.ORThe one where the Winchesters grow up in a drastically different way and are pretty much adopted by the Stilinski's. The Hale's get a happy life rewrite and everything canon is pretty much changed to suit my needs. Originally called 'Echoes in our Lives'

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,083Chapters: 20/45Kudos: 44

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up with Stiles Stilinski as a lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief time where they are in an A/B/O AU and where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much, so you can make your own choices. This story was originally my NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

entry.title: The Extremely Unofficial Guide to Beacon Hills Boarding School
entry.summary:
Author: randomreader46

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,656Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 19

Summary: Winning a scholarship to Beacon Hills Preparatory is supposed to be Stiles Stilinski’s fresh start.Instead, he gets rich kids with trust funds, a campus that looks suspiciously like a murder mystery setting, a new best friend within approximately ten minutes, and Derek Hale — Beacon’s perpetually scowling lacrosse captain, who seems to dislike Stiles on sight.Honestly? Rude.______________________Tags will update as the fic progresses to prevent spoilers

entry.title: Scent of a Secret
entry.summary:
Author: jackwinchesthair

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,392Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: Stiles is convinced he’s doing an excellent job hiding his newest secret. Unfortunately, keeping secrets in Beacon Hills is difficult when half of your friends have supernatural senses. Derek Hale notices there’s something strange going on before Stiles realizes he’s being observed. What starts as curiosity quickly turns into several weeks of denial, increasingly suspicious behavior, and one very patient Alpha trying to figure out exactly what Stiles is hiding. Derek, unfortunately, has the nose of a werewolf.

entry.title: An Endless Road to (re)Discover
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,122Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 34

Summary: Sheriff Stilinski recovers from his injury and tries to keep the pack together in the absence of their Alpha; Chris Argent struggles with guilt over his role in the pack's recent troubles; Teal'c tries to balance his responsibilities to the pack with his obligations to the Free Jaffa Nation and the SGC; Daniel Jackson supports Derek through his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor and his search for his sister.

entry.title: O U T S I D E
entry.summary:
Author: eternautumn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,540Chapters: 6/16Kudos: 15

Summary: Derek is an agent working for the FBI and on the trail of an elusive serial killer, though always two steps behind. Stiles is an eccentric starving artist and part-time sleuth that may just be the key to a break in the case. Somewhere outside, they meet in the middle.   A dark AU.

entry.title: Pride in the Rain
entry.summary:
Author: WolfFeller

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,583Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 6

Summary: 🌈 Pride, rain, and romance. 💙 River thrives in the storm while Isaac falls even harder.💛 Stiles complains, Derek endures.❤️ Peter becomes a shirtless rain god, Chris suffers, Noah laughs. Then the rainbow comes out.

entry.title: The fire´s memory
entry.summary:
Author: Tresaure

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,036Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 5

Summary: The official truth about the fire that consumed the Hale family is starting to crack: the ashes hide inconsistencies, dark pacts, and an impossible-to-ignore question mark: A girl named Paige.How is it possible for her to be there if death was supposed to have taken her years ago?

entry.title: My mother cursed Derek (english version)
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,064Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 71

Summary: Stiles is tired of always being the second best, never anyone's priority. He loves Derek madly, and because of this unrequited feeling, he decides to cast a spell to erase all the emotional attachment he had. Mother Claudia, a ghost who haunts her child, decides to curse Derek.

entry.title: Someone Else's Tupperware
entry.summary:
Author: ModeratelyScathed

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,760Chapters: 6/7Kudos: 136

Summary: The funny thing is, Stiles actually has no idea who just climbed through his window. Doesn't really care, either. All he wants to do is catch a few hours of uninterrupted sleep before the nightmares drag him back to consciousness.Again.Still, he expects some sort of snarky response if it's Derek or Peter. Or maybe the vocal embodiment of Scott's puppy dog eyes if it's his best friend.He doesn't expect several seconds of silence.And he definitely doesn't expect the sudden and unmistakable thump of a body hitting the ground.

entry.title: on the skyline
entry.summary:
Author: sterek24 (mooncry89)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,581Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Following the fall of the Nogitsune (for the last time, if everything actually worked out in Stiles's favor), he's still having some strange dreams and there's new bad guys stumbling into Beacon Hills all the time. The Hale pack will have to work together to figure out what the newest creature feature is and just why Stiles seems to be at the middle of it all, because isn't he always?
